cli.discovery: Read nodePath, cliPath and versionCommand from the local Codex Praetor configuration; never commit account or path details.

mappings.provider_semantics: Use the verified -y plus Read, Grep and Glob allowlist for a bounded audit.
Use the verified -y plus edit-tool allowlist only in the disposable worker worktree.

lifecycle.launch: invoke-codex-praetor.ps1 creates the command from the approved fixed model and permission tuple.
lifecycle.parse_terminal_state: watch-codex-praetor-job.ps1 separates a clean process exit from a usable worker result.
lifecycle.cleanup: The job record persists for Codex review; controlled retention later reclaims disposable worktrees.

evidence.end_to_end: A current-generation provider canary in an isolated worktree is required before real dispatch.
